user.title: ChargePoint Credentials
user.description: Please enter your ChargePoint login credentials.

reauth_confirm.title: ChargePoint Reauthentication
reauth_confirm.description: Please provide the current ChargePoint account password for: **{username}**.

captcha_token.title: Bot Protection Detected
captcha_token.description:
ChargePoint's bot protection (Datadome) blocked the password login. You can [resolve the challenge]({captcha_url}) in a browser and try again, or follow the steps below to provide a session token directly — this is more reliable and avoids the issue entirely.

**How to get your token:**
1. Open [https://driver.chargepoint.com](https://driver.chargepoint.com) in your browser and log in normally.
2. Open Developer Tools and navigate to **Application → Cookies → https://driver.chargepoint.com**.
3. Copy the value of the **`coulomb_sess`** cookie.
4. Paste it into the field below.

error.invalid_credentials: Invalid credentials, please verify you're using the right credentials and try again.
error.invalid_token: The token is invalid or expired. Please obtain a fresh `coulomb_sess` cookie value from driver.chargepoint.com and try again.
error.unknown_error: Unknown error communicating with ChargePoint. Please review the logs and create an issue.
